series_metadata.series_title: Waivers of Continuing Medical Education Requirements
series_metadata.series_description: Request for waiver of CME requirements; copies of cover letters, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until scanned to electronic medium for storage and scan is checked for accuracy; then destroy. If not scanned then retain for 2 years following the end of the renewal period to which the waiver request applied, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years following the end of the renewal period to which the waiver request applied., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
